name: Origin Energy Limited
description: Origin Energy Limited is one of Australia's leading energy companies, dedicated to exploring, generating, and delivering energy to millions of customer accounts across the country. The company provides a diverse range of services, including electricity, natural gas, internet, solar solutions, and battery storage. Committed to its purpose of getting energy right for customers, communities, and the planet, Origin Energy focuses on innovation and sustainability while supporting the transition to a cleaner energy future. Through its integrated operations, the company plays a vital role in powering homes, businesses, and the broader Australian economy.
